scope: Current systematic visible-record audit aligned to the protocol table schema exactly. Each cited primary learned/adaptive OD, optical tracklet-correlation, or learned initial-OD evaluation is scored against I1--I7 as defined in paper/supplement.tex: I1 fixed falsification gates; I2 paired trajectory-unit resampling plus Holm/BH multiplicity; I3 capacity/input-matched controls; I4 separate noise-side and force-side structural-channel withdrawal rules; I5 upstream architecture sanity reproduction plus scoped transposition diagnostic; I6 approximate astrodynamics-grounded CRLB floor and sensitivity audit; I7 evidence-record traceability. The audit boundary remains a visible-record scoping audit, not a confirmatory test or universal literature absence proof.
selection_rule: Every cited learned or adaptive orbit-determination evaluation, optical tracklet-correlation evaluation, or learned/adaptive initial-orbit-determination evaluation in the manuscript bibliography that reports an empirical satellite state-estimation or initial-OD comparison against at least one classical baseline. Surveys, domain-adjacent spacecraft-GNN telemetry papers, pure orbit-prediction papers without an estimator/IOD comparison, and TLE-only prediction papers are excluded. The pure TLE orbit-prediction paper previously keyed liu2023satellite is excluded under this rule; the learned short-arc neural-IOD study zhu2026multiscale is included.

ingredient_definitions.I1_fixed_falsification_gates: Fixed falsification gates with timestamped rule records where available: endpoint hierarchy, practical floor, and pass/fail predicates fixed before held-out evaluation with no rule retuning.
ingredient_definitions.I2_paired_trajectory_resampling_plus_hol: Paired trajectory-unit resampling using shared resample indices across estimators plus Holm familywise and Benjamini-Hochberg false-discovery-rate adjustment over the displayed pairwise family.
ingredient_definitions.I3_capacity_input_matched_controls: Capacity- and input-matched learned controls evaluated on the same data/curriculum, with strong classical OD guardrails on the same population.
ingredient_definitions.I4_noise_force_structural_channel_withdr: Separate predeclared positive criteria and withdrawal/failure decisions for noise-side adaptation and force-side structural responses.
ingredient_definitions.I5_upstream_architecture_sanity_reproduc: A published learned architecture sanity-reproduced on its native benchmark plus a separately scoped design-gap/adapted-transposition diagnostic when moved to SPOT-OD-like measurements.
ingredient_definitions.I6_astrodynamics_grounded_crlb_floor_sen: Approximate astrodynamics-grounded Cramer-Rao lower-bound floor in metres for long-arc decisions, with sensitivity variants and decision-stability audit.
ingredient_definitions.I7_evidence_record_traceability: Evidence-record traceability tying every headline to input-data digests, timestamped rule records, fixed seed/split/selection records, trained-model records, and evaluation records.

score_codes.Y: Verifiable as present from the bibliographic record, the published abstract or paper-side scope summary, or the manuscript related-work summary.
score_codes.N: Not visible under the ingredient definition above, or the evaluation class does not adopt that SPOT-OD claim form. A reviewer can falsify an N cell by exhibiting the named ingredient in the cited paper.
score_codes.NA: Not assessable from accessible material without deeper full-text inspection or without applying a more detailed cell-specific protocol. Reserved for genuinely borderline cells; NA is not counted as visible presence.

rows.scenario_class: Linear-canonical and Lorenz-attractor synthetic benchmarks; partially-known dynamics; learned gain RNN paired with model-based prior/measurement maps. Native benchmark is the paper's own design problem.
rows.evidence_phrase: The published evaluation reports KalmanNet on synthetic linear-canonical/Lorenz-style state-space benchmarks and the Michigan NCLT navigation data, with MSE curves and ablations against Kalman-family references. The accessible record does not show the full SPOT-OD protocol schema: fixed falsification gates with timestamped rule records (I1), paired trajectory-unit resampling plus Holm/BH multiplicity adjustment (I2), capacity/input-matched controls with strong classical guardrails (I3), separately predeclared noise-side and force-side structural-channel withdrawal rules (I4), upstream architecture sanity reproduction plus scoped transposition diagnostic where a learned transposition is claimed (I5), an approximate astrodynamics-grounded CRLB floor with sensitivity audit for long-arc decisions (I6), or digest-linked evidence-record traceability for the reported headlines (I7).

rows.scenario_class: Adaptive and dynamically constrained process-noise estimation for orbit determination; classical statistical-OD evaluation with covariance consistency reporting.
rows.evidence_phrase: The published evaluation reports adaptive and dynamically constrained process-noise estimation for operational orbit-determination cases under classical statistical-OD reporting. It is a close structural-channel antecedent, but the accessible record is not sufficient to score whether separate SPOT-OD-style noise-side and force-side structural-channel withdrawal criteria were fixed and adjudicated, so I4 is marked NA rather than N. The accessible record does not show the remaining SPOT-OD protocol schema: fixed falsification gates with timestamped rule records (I1), paired trajectory-unit resampling plus Holm/BH multiplicity adjustment (I2), capacity/input-matched learned controls with strong classical guardrails (I3), upstream architecture sanity reproduction plus scoped transposition diagnostic where a learned transposition is claimed (I5), an approximate astrodynamics-grounded CRLB floor with sensitivity audit for long-arc decisions (I6), or digest-linked evidence-record traceability for the reported headlines (I7).

summary.absence_explanation: Across the 19 audited evaluations, the accessible record does not show the full I1--I7 conjunction. Two genuinely borderline cells are marked NA rather than N: Stacey and D'Amico 2021 on I4, and Scorsoglio et al. 2026 on I3. NA is not counted as visible presence. The current schema combines trajectory-unit pairing and Holm/BH multiplicity in I2, moves capacity/input controls to I3, moves separate noise-side and force-side structural-channel withdrawal rules to I4, moves upstream sanity reproduction/scoped transposition to I5, adds the astrodynamics-grounded CRLB floor and sensitivity audit as I6, and keeps evidence-record traceability as I7.
summary.interpretation: No cited learned/adaptive OD, optical tracklet-correlation, or learned initial-OD evaluation in the scoped visible-record audit exhibits all seven discipline ingredients under the current protocol definitions. Any single N or NA cell remains falsifiable by exhibiting the named ingredient or enough protocol detail to rescore the cell in the cited record; the table is a scoped composition audit rather than a universal absence proof.
